name: @nexuscode/enterprise
description: NexusCode enterprise subsystem (system-spec §25) — tamper-evident hash-chained audit log (append-only, redacted, verifiable NDJSON) and usage/cost analytics (per principal/role/provider/model over day/week/month windows, csv/json export). Reuses @nexuscode/shared Usage+computeCost and @nexuscode/tools redaction. Offline, no external identity provider.
